channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Damaged speed hump, ripping tyres, 6th March
item.description:
Speed hump is damaged and very sharp, caused 2 punctures and damaged my wheels
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stadium Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags dumped, 6th March
item.description:
Bags of stuff dumped on Allerton Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lordship Park, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th March
item.description:
In the walkway between Somerford Way and Steers Way. It is a recurring incident, however these items are new - a chair and a side table.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerford Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass grown over path and made path so narrow, 6th March
item.description:
This central path is used constantly, especially for parents walking children to school. The grass has grown over the path which has made it progressively narrower and it means having to walk on the grass (and mud) to pass other walkers which isn’t great when it has rained and the grass becomes like a bog! There needs to be more effort put into maintaining this recreation ground for the residents and to ensure vulnerable people can walk here safely.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hodson Crescent, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th March
item.description:
1 x door, 2 x draws and 1 x palette, been accumulating in last two weeks or so. Located in public walkway/driveway next to 1 Victory Way, behind 25 Somerford Way.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Steers Way, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement slabs, 6th March
item.description:
Pavement slabs broken around the area marked on map causing a trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Culver Avenue, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip of mattress at gable end of 13 Church Road, 6th March
item.description:
Fly tip of mattress at gable end of 13 Church Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Milestone Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole re-emerging outside 10 Royston Road, 6th March
item.description:
Pothole was filed outside no 10! New pothole emerging next to the filled the pothole!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street cleaning request as litter in tyndall road, 6th March
item.description:
Res have reported that there is cans and leaves that need to be cleared in tyndall road in the car parking bays. please can this be done urgently as hasn't been done in a while.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tyndall Road, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip in green area behind bus stop no.3, 6th March
item.description:
The embankment west of the parade just above bowley close (see picture) and below bus stop no. 3 is full of litter which have accumulated over the years. This site (houses and embankment) is owned by southwark council and should be kept clean.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bowley Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumping of horse manure, 6th March
item.description:
We live at 5 Furner Close DA1 4SS, the land at the rear of our garden is used by the stables. They are constantly dumping horse manure close to our back fence. Previously they were told to have it taken away. However, this is not happening and they are distributing it around, destroying the undergrowth and causing severe smell and flies, especially during summer months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Furner Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 6th March
item.description:
This has been there for months and the council tell me it is on private land but will not tell me who owns it. I reported this again before Christmas as there were rats around it. After reporting this on this site I was told by the council that the environmental team would be in touch with me. However, to do date nothing has happened and the rubbish just keeps being added to

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Groom Road, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road Markings Faded, 6th March
item.description:
The Road markings arrows are 90% non visible and needs repainting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 636-638, High Road, Tottenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned blue Toyota. Seemingly untaxed., 6th March
item.description:
This car has been parked on the public road adjacent to the Fairacres Estate, for quite a few weeks now. Taking up a parking spot.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fair Acres, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipped White Chest of Draws Outside of 13 Royston Road, 6th March
item.description:
Fly Tipped furniture
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked Drain outside 13 Royston Road, 6th March
item.description:
Drain been blocked for years! Thick mud and the water does not drain away during periods of heavy rain.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 6th March
item.description:
Dead fox on the public path, where people walk, and walk their children to school.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Penn Lane, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter strewn in bushes opposite 91 Burrage Road, 6th March
item.description:
Photos taken 5th March 2026. Lots of litter has been thrown into the bushes that’s on council land by the pavement on Burrage Road opposite 85/91/97 Burrage road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruddstreet Close, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Roots, 6th March
item.description:
Tree roots outside 27 MacKenzie Road lifting pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish and broken food waste bin outside park gates, 6th March
item.description:
See above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17b, Costa Street, Greater London
